name: stay-safe
description: Web application for sexual and reproductive health education and support for University students.

scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
scripts.test:api: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/api && node --test apps/api/tests/*.test.js
scripts.type-check: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run type-check --workspaces
